# Andrey Kutsenko

> Software engineer in San Francisco. Automation, data parsing, document
> pipelines and fintech systems by day; LLM experiments after hours.
> Builder of SimpleProcess.io.

## Work
- Software Engineer @ InfoIMAGE — data parsing, document processing and
  Unix/Linux automation for fintech.
- SimpleProcess.io (https://simpleprocess.io) — business automation and
  AI-driven outreach tools.

## Stack
Python, SQL, Shell, TypeScript, Docker, Cloudflare Workers, LLM APIs.

## Pages
- https://kutsenko.dev/ — this one-page site (plain HTML, no frameworks)
- https://kutsenko.dev/dashboard/ — personal feed reader (Hacker News,
  GitHub radar, r/LocalLLaMA, LessWrong), refreshed hourly by a
  Cloudflare Worker at /api/homepage.

## Contact
- Email: kutsenko@gmail.com
